name: Hungry Lily & The Fallen Knight
short_description: Hungry Lily & the Fallen Knight is a platform 2D game with a twist. you start off as a weak sausage dog named Lily as she finds her way in a new world jumping platform to platform getting more stronger each level and having new powers. collecting sprats as her favourite treat. PLATFORM GAME.
detailed_description:
Hungry Lily & the Fallen Knight is a 2D pixel art platformer with a twist — you play as Lily, a scrappy little sausage dog tossed into a strange new world.

Start out weak and unsure, but grow stronger with each level as you unlock new powers, collect sprats (her favorite treat), and overcome increasingly challenging platforming trials.

You’ll dodge enemies, land on moving platforms, and master tricky timed jumps. In the later dungeon levels (Level 9+), you’ll gain special abilities and face tougher, corrupted enemies as Lily’s journey deepens.

The game features a light story with mysterious characters, and more levels, powers, and secrets will be added during Early Access!

 By installing this game, you agree to the End User License Agreement (EULA), which is shown before installation.
